raw_consumer_statement:
Summary : I am disputing XXXX reporting and handling of my former Citicards CBNA credit card account. The account was charged off for approximately {$39000.00}, even though my original credit limit was {$17000.00} and the balance was allowed to exceed that limit without authorization. 

Timeline and Issues : My last legitimate payment was made on XX/XX/year> for {$50.00} from my XXXX XXXX  account. Citibanks reports to the credit bureaus show a different Date of Last Payment. 
I filed multiple written disputes and fraud complaints with Citibank at that time, supported by documentation, because several charges were fraudulent or unauthorized. 
Despite those disputes, Citibank continued billing, allowed further charges, and later reported the account as charged off without completing a proper investigation or honoring my rights under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( 15 U.S.C. 1666 ).

The current reporting also misrepresents my credit history under the Fair Credit Reporting Act ( 15 U.S.C. 1681s-2 ) because the balance, limit, and payment history are inaccurate and incomplete. 


Supporting Evidence : I am attaching my dispute letter, proof of last payment, and supporting records. Citibank has access to my original dispute and fraud investigation files from 2021 and should retrieve them for verification.
